race.comment: DIAMOND INDARUF (5) is speedy and missed 1L over 1200m at Moe two runs back, then was below her best last time over 1206m at Kyneton, beaten 2.75 lengths. Has a key jockey switch with Nolen replacing the 2kg apprentice, and she can get back on track. DANI CALIFORNIA (1) resumed and is up to this if presented forward by the new stable. Just missed in a recent Caulfield Heath trial, suggesting all is in order. He has plenty of scope for improvement. RATTLE'N'ROLL (7) resumes and has also switched stables. Has raced in stronger than this since his Maiden win and looked tuned up in a recent Echuca jump-out. SNAPPY TYCOON (4) has been busting to win and will be sharper this trip and will appreciate a dryer surface. Has to be considered as well.
